headline: Paintings and objects, finished by hand
description: Each collection is developed around a tactile story. Clay, canvas, pigment, and glaze vary subtly from piece to piece, so no two works are identical.

items.name: Awakening
items.description: Layered abstract works with luminous movement, soft contrast, and a quiet sense of arrival.

image.alt: Awakening abstract painting with layered color and soft movement.

items.name: Coastal Stone
items.description: Minimal ceramic silhouettes with carved rims and ash-white glaze.

image.alt: Studio ceramics arranged with natural materials in the atelier.

items.name: Azure Dreams
items.description: Blue-toned canvas studies with atmospheric depth and coastal light.

image.alt: Azure Dreams painting with blue abstract layers and airy movement.

items.name: Studio Archive
items.description: One-off experimental objects and studies from glaze, pigment, and firing tests.

image.alt: Atelier archive pieces and artworks displayed together.
